description: Prevent star_fort_trace_italienne from depending on Brunelleschi architecture; its direct prerequisites should remain artillery/geometry/construction oriented until the node is separately source-checked.

checks.reason: Trace italienne/star-fort fortification should not depend directly on Brunelleschi's Florentine architecture.
The scoped fortification form is modeled as a response to cannon/artillery pressure.
The scoped fortification form depends on geometric bastion layout.
